headline: Klarna Scales Embedded Resale with eBay to Six New Markets, Turning Everyday Purchases Into Circular Commerce
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif. & NEW YORK, March 04, 2026--Klarna, the global digital bank and payments provider, and eBay, a global commerce leader connecting millions of buyers and sellers worldwide, today announced the expansion of Klarna’s embedded resell integration with eBay to six new markets: Australia, Belgium, Canada, Ireland, Poland and Switzerland.

headline: Assessing eBay (EBAY) Valuation After Depop Acquisition And Workforce Reallocation
summary: eBay (EBAY) has moved to cut about 800 roles, roughly 6% of its workforce, shortly after agreeing to acquire Gen Z focused fashion resale platform Depop for about US$1.2b and stepping up investment in AI and recommerce. See our latest analysis for eBay. Those workforce cuts and the Depop deal come after a busy few weeks for eBay, including its fourth quarter 2025 earnings release, fresh 2026 guidance, a dividend increase, and continued share buybacks.
